texto: Yefgenii said, "The Americans spent millions of dollars designing a pen that would work in space. What did we do?" Gevorkian's head was down, his eyes were down. "What did we do?"Gevorkian lifted his head "We used pencils.""We used pencils.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jed Mercurio que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “Yefgenii said, "The Americans spent millions of dollars designing a pen that would work in space.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, humour, perspective, com foco em trabalho e perspective.
